tasks.label: Perf Test API 500 users
tasks.command: cd api && nohup npm run dev > /tmp/tawjeeh_api_perf.log 2>&1 & sleep 6 && curl -s -o /dev/null -w HEALTH_HTTP=%{http_code} http://localhost:3000/health && echo && npx autocannon -c 500 -d 30 -p 10 --renderStatusCodes http://localhost:3000/api/v1/resources
